name: Core Hello World
description: Minimal world creation, static ground, a dynamic box, stepping, and body position reads.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Error Handling
description: Recoverable try APIs and application boundary context for invalid input.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Events
description: Sensor, contact, hit, and body-move event snapshots.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Body Controls
description: Dynamic, kinematic, disabled, force, impulse, motion-lock, and transform-sync body APIs.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Shape Queries
description: World, body, and shape-scoped query APIs for editor tools, picking, and gameplay probes.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Compound Query
description: Compound child AABB queries, reusable buffers, visitor early-stop, and owned byte transfer.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Mesh Height Field Query
description: Standalone mesh and height-field triangle queries with owned results and visitor callbacks.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Advanced Collision
description: Standalone distance, shape-cast, local manifold, and plane solver helpers.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Continuous Collision
description: Shape-cast, time-of-impact, and bullet-body settings for fast-moving-shape diagnostics.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Character Mover
description: Capsule mover casts, contact planes, correction, and clipped velocity.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Dynamic Tree
description: Standalone broad-phase tree lifecycle, filters, overlap, closest, ray, and box-cast visitors.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Joints
description: Distance joint creation and runtime reads after simulation.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Recording Replay
description: Recording, replay player controls, and divergence validation.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Determinism
description: Simulation recording and explicit replay determinism validation with one worker.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Physics Thread
description: Dedicated physics thread ownership with plain snapshots sent over channels.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Task System
description: Rust-owned Box3D task callbacks with blocking worker threads and scheduler counters.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Tokio Async Bridge
description: spawn_blocking and async channels so async apps do not hold World across async tasks.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Egui Debug Draw
description: Native egui and wgpu viewer consuming plain Box3D debug draw snapshots.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native desktop viewer today.

name: Mint Interop
description: mint Vector3, Point3, and Quaternion conversions in a normal world setup.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Glam Interop
description: glam Vec3, Quat, and velocity snapshot conversions in a normal world setup.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: Nalgebra Interop
description: nalgebra Vector3, Point3, UnitQuaternion, and Isometry3 conversions.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native terminal example today.

name: WASM Smoke
description: Single-thread world, falling body, AABB query, and runtime check under WASI.
status: Headless WASM is tested; browser canvas live mode is planned next.

name: Provider Smoke
description: Browser-style provider mode with shared WebAssembly memory and Box3D C imports.
status: CI verifies the provider architecture; a visible browser page is planned next.

name: Bevy Falling Stack
description: Dynamic rigid bodies, static floor, Bevy camera, lights, meshes, and transform sync.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native 3D app today.

name: Bevy Advanced Colliders
description: Static mesh, height-field, compound, sphere, and hull-backed colliders.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native 3D app today.

name: Bevy Joint Gallery
description: Every public declarative joint variant displayed with connected bodies.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native 3D app today.

name: Bevy Contact Messages
description: Bevy messages for contact begin, contact end, hit, and sensor events.
status: Shown in the web catalog; runs as a native 3D app today.

name: Bevy Debug Gizmos

name: Bevy Debug Draw Overlay
description: Box3D debug draw commands rendered through Bevy Gizmos.

name: Bevy Physics Picking
description: Camera cursor rays resolved through Box3D queries instead of mesh picking.

description: Egui-driven scene browser with picking, debug draw, and representative Box3D concepts.
